title: Require a Human Review Gate for Student-Facing AI Output
audience: Teachers, school leaders, and parent advisory groups
problem: AI tools can produce fluent explanations, lesson materials, or student feedback that contain errors, bias, privacy exposure, or claims that do not match the learning goal.
practical_step: Before AI-assisted material reaches students or families, assign a named adult reviewer to check accuracy, age fit, privacy exposure, and alignment with the learning goal.
caveat: This card is a public education aid. It is not legal advice, student safety advice, or a substitute for local school policy and qualified professional judgment.
human_gate: A teacher or school leader signs off before the material is used, and records what was changed or rejected after review.
